findings.title: T2-to-T3 security handoff has no dependency edge
findings.detail: T2 security and T3 devops run concurrently, but T2 incorrectly names T3 as a consumer of the S6 release gates.

blocking_findings.title: T2-to-T3 security handoff has no dependency edge
blocking_findings.detail: A same-wave handoff is declared without a dependency edge.
